name: NIFA: Nonlinear IMC enhanced FPGA for efficient ML inference
summary: arXiv:2607.15123v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent FPGAs have improved deep learning (DL) inference efficiency through dedicated tensor blocks and in-BRAM computation. ReRAM-based analog in-m...
description: arXiv:2607.15123v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent FPGAs have improved deep learning (DL) inference efficiency through dedicated tensor blocks and in-BRAM computation. ReRAM-based analog in-memory computing (IMC) pushes efficiency further, offering an order-of-magnitude improvement in compute density and energy efficiency over conventional digital logic by performing vector-matrix multipl...
author: Jiajun Hu, Ruthwik Reddy Sunketa, Lei Zhao, Archit Gajjar, Luca Buonanno, Aman Arora
